name: Born Park
description: Born Park is a place to play pickleball in Cerro Gordo, IL. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Robert C. Burke Memorial Park
description: Robert C. Burke Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monticello, IL. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include water. The courts are free.
